case_title: MCLEOD, GLEN VS RIVERS, TIM MR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCLEOD, GLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERS, TIM MR. $660.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $699.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
